mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in payroll employment growth signals weakening labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings potential, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Payrolls growth remains above 100k in 90% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and housing starts signal weakening supply-side capacity utilization, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and HOUST shows no significant predictive power (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests, or 60d returns remain positive in 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and elevated federal funds rates signals stagflationary pressures that depress equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of cases where both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS exceed thresholds, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in unemployment rate signals tight labor market conditions that increase wage pressures and corporate costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns show positive correlation with UNRATE declines (Rank IC > 0.10) in 80% of cases, or t-test p-value < 0.05 for negative association.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in residential construction (RSAFS) signals weakening demand for housing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or RSAFS decline remains below 3% in 90% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of declining industrial production and rising inflation signals supply-side shocks that increase input costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 2% and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and CPIAUCSL shows no significant predictive power (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests, or 60d returns remain positive in 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in GDP growth (GDPC1) and housing starts (HOUST) signal strong demand conditions that boost corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between GDPC1 and HOUST shows no significant predictive power (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests, or 60d returns remain negative in 70% of cases.
